headline: Electronic Arts (EA) Shows Why Its $55 Billion Buyout Case Rests on More Than Deal Momentum
summary: Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ:EA) is one of the best e-gaming and sports betting stocks to buy now. The company’s clearest investor story is its pending $55 billion take-private transaction, which has turned EA into a deal-driven gaming stock as much as an operating growth story. On May 5, EA said it was still working through […]

headline: 3 Profitable Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.

headline: Oak-Eagle AcquireCo, Inc. Announces Extension of the Expiration Time and Settlement Date for the Previously Announced Tender Offers and Consent Solicitations for Any and All of Electronic Arts Inc.'s 1.850% Senior Notes Due 2031 and 2.950% Senior Notes Due 2051
